description_long: This is a freestanding cabinet with a marble-patterned surface and backsplash, featuring a symmetrical arrangement of drawers and doors on the front. The cabinet has three central drawers stacked vertically, flanked by two sets of double doors on either side, and two wide drawers above the doors. All doors and drawers are equipped with sleek, horizontal metal handles. The sides and back of the cabinet are finished in the same marble-like material, giving it a cohesive and elegant appearance. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for supporting various objects or appliances. The overall design suggests durability and a modern aesthetic, making it suitable for urban interiors such as kitchens, bathrooms, or utility rooms.
description: A marble-patterned freestanding cabinet with multiple drawers and doors, metal handles, and a flat backsplash. The design is modern and functional, with a cohesive finish on all sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing three central drawers, two sets of double doors, two wide drawers above, and all metal handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the marble-patterned side panel and the backsplash extension.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain marble-patterned back panel with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the marble finish and backsplash.
